name: Tom Henderson
notes: Searched for 'AC installation Wayne PA'. New homeowner, needs central AC for first time.

name: Sandra Kim
notes: Found us on Angi. Radnor homeowner. 2,400 sq ft colonial. No existing ductwork in addition.

interactions.summary: AI called to follow up on Angi lead. Discussed options. She wants to get two more quotes first.

name: Rich & Donna Caputo
notes: Referred by Patrick Murphy (cust-019). 20-year-old furnace in Havertown home. Very interested.

interactions.summary: Initial contact. Discussed furnace issues. Old Lennox system, frequent repairs.
Follow-up call. Ready for in-home estimate. Prefers weekday morning.

name: Amanda Liu
notes: Havertown cape cod, 1960s home. Oil furnace + window units. Wants full modernization. High-value lead.

interactions.summary: Called in asking about complete HVAC overhaul. AI booked free estimate for Feb 28.

name: Mark Stefano
notes: Missed call from KoP area. Need to call back ASAP.

name: Christine Donovan
notes: Wants mini-split for garage conversion in Ardmore. Found us on Thumbtack.

interactions.summary: Initial call. Discussed Mitsubishi vs Lennox mini-split options.
Texted to check if she's ready to schedule estimate. No response yet.

name: Phil & Teresa Mancini
notes: Devon area. Found us on Yelp with 4.8 stars. Went with competitor - lower price.

interactions.summary: Initial contact. They want to replace 15-year-old Trane AC.
James Wilson provided in-home estimate. $7,500 for Carrier 24ACC. Customer seemed interested.
Follow-up call. Customer chose competitor offering $6,200 for Goodman unit.

name: Yolanda Price
notes: Clicked on Facebook ad about heat pump rebates. Ardmore address. Submitted form but missed our callback.

name: Dan & Kelly O'Shea
notes: Referred by the Fitzgeralds (cust-015). Old boiler in Bryn Mawr stone home. Want to convert to forced air.

interactions.summary: Initial contact. Boiler is 25 years old, leaking. Want to convert to forced air with AC.
Discussed ductwork requirements and timeline. They need it done before next winter.
Confirmed estimate appointment for March 3. Both homeowners will be present.

name: Ray Nguyen
notes: Google Local Services lead. AC making noise. Malvern area.

interactions.summary: Speed-to-lead call within 30 min. AC humming loudly but it's February - not urgent. Wants spring appointment.

name: Deborah Simmons
notes: Clicked Facebook ad for $99 tune-up special. Havertown. Has older Rheem system.

interactions.summary: Called to discuss tune-up special. Also pitched maintenance plan. She wants to talk to husband.

name: Justin & Megan Park
notes: Filled out website form for heat pump info. Wayne area, new construction. Want to go all-electric.

interactions.summary: Discussed all-electric options. Very interested in Carrier Infinity heat pump with Greenspeed.
Sent brochure and rebate information for heat pumps.
Ready for estimate. Want to see Carrier and Lennox options side by side.

name: Barbara West
notes: Media area. Needed furnace repair urgently but we couldn't get to her same day. Went with competitor.

interactions.summary: Called requesting same-day furnace repair. We were booked. Offered next morning.
Called to follow up. She already had it fixed by another company.

name: Eric & Vanessa Turner
notes: Thumbtack lead for spring AC tune-up. Radnor area. New to our service.

interactions.summary: Speed-to-lead call. Booked spring tune-up for March 15. Also interested in maintenance plan.

name: Natalie Russo
notes: Bryn Mawr. Google LSA lead. 18-year-old furnace dying. Needs replacement before next winter.

interactions.summary: Quick response to lead. Discussed timeline and financing options.
Follow-up. She's comparing three companies. Wants estimate next week.

name: Howard Chen
notes: Malvern homeowner. Submitted online form about uneven heating. Suspects ductwork issues. Older home.
